violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Shelving in walk in cooler needs cleaning. Minor detail cleaning needed.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --A sink with a least three compartments was not provided for manual cleaning, rinsing, and sanitizing of equipment/utensils. 2 compartment sink used in BOH kitchen for ware washing.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. Coffee mugs washed in FOH hand sink.
Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Peeling paint on walls/ceiling in kitchen.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Oven cleaner stored in BOH kitchen cabinet with food service items.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
